design_issues: Config main screen (4 sections: Payment Methods, Categories, Rates, Preferences)

All 4 sections visible on one scroll, each collapsible. Payment Methods: list by type, name + type badge + last4 if card, add button per type. Categories: grouped by grouping category, name + grouping badge + edit/delete, add category + add grouping. Rates: name + value + last updated + edit/delete, add custom rate. Preferences: number format radio, date format radio, global currency dropdown. Breathing room layout — not data-dense.
Rate form modal + rate deletion flow

Rate form modal: name (text), value (numeric, text label 'ARS →' next to field), last updated timestamp on edit only, Save + Cancel. Deletion unreferenced path: simple confirm dialog 'Delete [Name]?'. Deletion referenced path: Step 1 — 'X entries use [Name]. Select a replacement rate.' Replacement dropdown of all other rates. Step 2 — 'X entries currently associated with [Name] ([value]) will be reassigned to [Replacement]. Their historical amounts will not change.' Confirm + Cancel.
Category form modal + category deletion flow

Category form modal: name, grouping category dropdown (existing groupings + 'New grouping…' option). 'New grouping…' inline: expand inline name field + save both atomically on Save. Save + Cancel. Deletion flow: Step 1 — 'X entries use [Name]. Select a replacement category.' Replacement dropdown (all other categories + 'Create new category' inline). Step 2 — 'X entries using [Old Name] will be moved to [New Name]. [If grouping changes: Their grouping will also change from [Old Grouping] to [New Grouping].]' Confirm + Cancel.

Grouping category form modal: name field, Save + Cancel. Delete action: disabled with tooltip 'Reassign or delete all categories in this grouping first' when categories exist; enabled (simple confirm) when grouping is empty.

Payment method form modal: name, type radio (card / cash / transfer), card_last4 (4-digit numeric — visible only when type = card), Save + Cancel. Deletion unreferenced: simple confirmation. Deletion referenced: 'X entries use this payment method. They will retain the name but it will no longer be available for new entries.' Confirm + Cancel.

DEV-18: Implement Config data layer — TanStack Query hooks for 5 entities: rates, grouping_categories, categories, payment_methods, user_config. Full CRUD per entity where applicable.
DEV-19: Implement deep link handler — reads ?section= and ?highlight= query params, validates section against 4 slugs (payment-methods, categories, rates, preferences) and highlight as UUID, scrolls to section + applies 1s CSS highlight animation. Invalid params silently ignored.

DEV-20: Implement Config main page layout — 4 collapsible sections (Payment Methods, Categories, Rates, Preferences) from approved D-11 design. Each section renders its list + add action.
D-11 (design approved), DEV-18 (data layer), I-07 (DB), I-09 (routing)
DEV-21: Implement Payment Methods section + form modal from approved D-15 design. CRUD: add, edit, delete (simple confirm if unreferenced; soft-delete notice if referenced).
D-15 (design approved), DEV-20 (main layout), DEV-18 (data layer)
DEV-22: Implement Categories section + form modal + deletion flow from approved D-13 design. Includes grouping category dropdown with inline 'New grouping…' creation. Deletion: replacement-select flow if entries exist.
D-13 (design approved), DEV-20 (main layout), DEV-18 (data layer)
DEV-23: Implement Grouping Categories form from approved D-14 design. Inline form within categories section. Delete disabled with tooltip when categories exist under grouping.

DEV-24: Implement Rates section + form modal + deletion flow from approved D-12 design. Deletion: replacement-select flow (referenced path) or simple confirm (unreferenced path).

DEV-25: Implement Preferences section — number format radio, date format radio, global currency dropdown. Persists to user_config table via data layer.
